frameworks.name: compositional pattern description language
frameworks.one_line: complex visual patterns built recursively from simpler primitive structures

frameworks.name: non-compositional pattern description
frameworks.one_line: flat, non-recursive descriptive model used as baseline

frameworks.name: language of thought
frameworks.one_line: natural language taps a compositionally structured internal representation

core_question: Do people perceive and communicate visual patterns through a compositional description language?
key_assumptions: patterns admit a generative grammar of simpler-to-complex composition
natural-language descriptions can be mapped to a structured pattern language
communication efficacy reflects underlying representational structure
key_findings: compositional patterns were communicated more effectively than non-compositional ones
the compositional model predicted which patterns were harder to describe
the model produced human-like quality ratings for participants' drawings
interpretations: natural language interfaces with a compositionally structured pattern description language
compositionality is a key organizing principle in perception and communication of structure
